name: Pumpkin Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and beat until smooth.
2. Cook on a griddle or skillet until browned on both sides, turning once.
Serves 4.
This recipe comes from "The Montana Cookbook," which is a unique and delicious collection of 500 favorite recipes from Montanans throughout the Treasure State. Formatted by Elaine Radis.
